programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: When Millie the Squid devises a set of tough penguin games to test the Piripenguins, Pancake and Nugget must stick together and rely on their friendship to succeed.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: A triple solar eclipse is about to happen! Cosima and Big Lizard race down the volcano and hitch a lift on a dragonfly so that they can get vital equipment to Dad in the nick of time.

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: The Chipmunk accidentally gets hit by a ball during a game of baseball. To make him feel better, the ducklings feed him popcorn. The Chipmunk pretends to be sick to get more and more privileges. Weasy has had enough!

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: The heroes are made to clean the Cave of Mirrors as punishment for frolicking before a quest is complete, and they accidentally release the Party Harpy.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: When Duck and Frog have to change a lighthouse’s light bulb, they quickly become marooned on the island. With no food, and surrounded by water, they must try to find a way to survive.

programme.title: Pokémon Horizons
programme.desc: Life is back to normal for Roy and friends, until wild Pokémon begin to act strangely...

programme.title: Bro's in Control
programme.desc: Adam and Joe become real-life pop stars, with dance moves provided by The Next Step cast.

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Legend, Cyclone, Nitro and Sabre return to compete at a hotel check-in. With a hidden earpiece, will they obey all silly instructions for the chance to win or tap out and risk losing?

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.desc: Join Joel, Abby and Shini on an epic Northern Ireland adventure! Joel finds out how potatoes are turned into crisps and invents his very own brand new flavour! Shini learns how to care for horses before saddling up for a ride along the stunning coastline, and we find out who is crowned the ultimate Celtic warrior.

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Topical news magazine for children.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall goes in search of bat-hunting boas, meets a team working to save the deadly but cute slow loris, and he comes face to face with the king of snakes: the king cobra.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: As the garden explodes with spring colour, Monty adds a dash of Mediterranean flair and flavour by planting lemons in pots. He also plants in the woodland garden and pots up summer bulbs. Sue Kent is in her vibrant Swansea garden, sowing tender crops, planting echiums and harvesting a delicious salad bowl. Jamie Butterworth is in Essex to discover why the humble euphorbia deserves to be considered one of the brightest stars of the border. There’s also a trip to West Sussex to visit renowned garden designer Rosemary Alexander in her private garden. Plus a passionate anemone grower preparing for their debut at the RHS Chelsea Flower Show.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 8 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife documentary. How does a chimpanzee see the world? A research project at Edinburgh Zoo is designed to answer just that question in an innovative new way - by training chimps to use video touch screens and giving them a special chimp-proof camera. How will they react to tools which in evolutionary terms are a few million years ahead of them? As chimp specialist Betsy Herrelko finds out, trying to communicate with chimps using video technology has its trials and tribulations as power struggles, bites and fights get in the way of the hairy chimp directors. However, by the end of the programme we are privileged to see the world's first film shot by chimpanzees.

programme.title: Women's Six Nations Rugby
programme.desc: Live coverage as Wales take on England in the Women's Six Nations.

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad and guests bring you all the goals, latest news, analysis, reaction and interviews from the afternoon’s biggest football matches.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: This edition of Flog It! comes from Longleat in Wiltshire, home to the world-famous safari park and 16th-century Longleat House. In this rather special show, Paul Martin is joined by experts Michael Baggott and Claire Rawle. Whilst picking out a selection of interesting antiques and collectables to be sold at a local auction, Claire spots an unusual Tibetan teapot. This leads to the momentous discovery of other of Tibetan artefacts belonging to the same owner, a collection of controversial historical significance which all ends up going under the hammer. With worldwide interest in these objects, will the Flog It! record for the highest value item sold at auction be broken when the sale goes on to raise thousands of pounds? Paul also gets the chance to explore Longleat House, learning more about its controversial creator and wonderful Elizabethan architecture.

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express
programme.desc: Returning to England from Istanbul on the Orient Express, Hercule Poirot is asked to investigate a murder.

programme.title: Inside Britain's National Parks
programme.desc: The Northumberland National Park is characterised by a unique landscape of wild moors, gentle hills and deep valleys criss-crossed by clear rivers. Its western border adjoins Kielder Forest, one of the largest man-made forests in Europe. This vast natural expanse is a haven for numerous bird species, including the osprey, once extinct in the UK but now returning annually from Africa to breed. The park is also rich in history, including extensive stretches of Hadrian’s Wall.

programme.title: Black British Music at the BBC
programme.desc: DJ Spoony takes a musical journey that showcases the artists, songs and genres that have done so much to shape the nation’s musical landscape over the years – from old school right up to the present. Spoony has personally selected a playlist of 40 great tracks that bring together some of the most inspiring names from the worlds of pop, soul, ska, reggae, rap and garage - and finds the likes of Seal, The Selecter and Soul II Soul rubbing shoulders with FKA Twigs, Miss Dynamite and Dame Shirley Bassey. Spoony also celebrates the rich vein of collaboration that runs through so much Black British music, sharing songs and performances from acts, including Wretch 32 and Shola Ama, Loyle Carner and Jorja Smith, Little Simz and Cleo Sol, and Tinie Tempah and Labrinth.

programme.title: Sight and Sound in Concert
programme.desc: Alan Black introduces Joan Armatrading in concert at the Hammersmith Odeon in 1977.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Highlights from day 8 of the World Snooker Championship in Sheffield.

programme.title: Mint
programme.desc: Shannon is obsessed with the love story of how her parents met - all she wants is her own romance to sweep her off her feet. But finding love is tough when you’re the only daughter of a notorious crime family. When Shannon meets Arran, she thinks her luck has finally changed. She feels the spark. But will her family allow it when they realise who he is?

programme.title: McCartney: The Hunt for the Lost Bass
programme.desc: The disappearance of Paul McCartney’s original Höfner bass over 50 years ago is one of rock ‘n’ roll’s great mysteries. This is the story of the iconic instrument and the quest to find it. Featuring exclusive interviews with Paul, his brother Mike, Klaus Voormann, Elvis Costello, and the roadies, journalists and fans who embarked on a mission to return the bass to its place in music history.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: John Craven and Charlotte Smith are in the Peak District National Park, famed for its breathtaking landscapes and wildlife. But despite its wild and rugged appearance, there’s a huge amount of work needed to protect it. John spends the day as a ranger and meets volunteers who have devoted years to caring for this landscape. Charlotte jumps on a bike to explore an accessible cycling route and heads out across the moors with a scientist monitoring one of the park's most elusive residents – the mountain hare. Adam Henson is also in the Peaks to see what happens when farmers stop going it alone and start working together.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg talks to those making the news, inside and outside politics.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 9 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Andi Oliver’s Fabulous Feasts
programme.desc: Andi is in Bristol to help Jasper Thompson, a local man whose pioneering homeless project transforms shipping containers into temporary accommodation. He wants to raise awareness about his new community cafe, so who better than Andi to help him put on an unforgettable launch party with a Caribbean flavour? To entice locals to the event and kick off the cafe with a bang, Andi must put together a unique and delicious feast that draws on her and Jasper’s own roots in Antigua and Jamaica while also paying tribute to Bristol’s wider Caribbean heritage, using only the best local produce. The cafe itself needs a complete refurb, but can Jasper get it ready in time, and can Andi harness the Bristolians' unique creative spirit to make sure the event’s a roaring success?

programme.title: London Marathon
programme.desc: Live coverage of the London Marathon continues as the 59,000 runners begin to reach the end of their 26.2 mile journey across the capital, each of them with their own unique reason for taking part in this year’s event. Gabby Logan and a team of reporters are with them every step of the way as they reveal the uplifting and inspiring stories of many of the charity runners taking part.

programme.title: UEFA Women's Champions League
programme.desc: Coverage of Arsenal v Lyon in the 2026 Women's Champions League.

programme.title: London Marathon
programme.desc: Gabby Logan has the best of the day’s action from the London Marathon. Four elite champions are crowned alongside 59,000 inspirational charity runners, making this the biggest edition of the event ever staged and raising millions for some good causes.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The Williamsons go for glory at their local show on Lewis, where their best sheep compete with the island's cream of the crop. Lucy and Adam reignite their dairy dreams, but their new baby arrives just as the workload ramps up. And Callum and Zara head south for a farm safety awareness event to commemorate those farmers and their families affected by accidents at work.

programme.title: Colombia with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Adventurer and journalist Simon Reeve heads to one of the most spectacular countries in the world - Colombia. For 50 years, Colombia has been in the grip of a brutal civil war that has killed more than 200,000 people and displaced seven million. But in late 2016, a peace deal was signed promising to end the conflict and finally bring peace to the country. In this hour-long documentary for the award-winning This World strand, Simon explores Colombia at a pivotal point in its history. He travels into the jungle and comes face to face with the guerrilla army Farc, which is now promising to lay down arms. In the Pacific coast city of Buenaventura, Simon finds out more about the fearsome right-wing paramilitary gangs who now dominate the cocaine trade. As the Farc abandon the countryside, there is a fear that these groups will only grow in power. Travelling in the countryside, Simon meets the coca farmers who are demanding government support to stop growing coca and stop the flow of money to criminal gangs. With land ownership, poverty and drugs at the heart of Colombia's problems, it is in the countryside that the country's precarious future will be decided.

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI
programme.desc: At midday on a busy high street in Birmingham, a group of armed robbers drive a truck into a jewellery shop, stealing £300,000 worth of gold. They escape in less than 60 seconds. Forensic scene investigator Drew Birtles is dispatched to the jewellery shop to recover any forensic clues which could help identify the robbers. The investigation becomes more challenging when no real forensic evidence is found at the crime scene and the robbers switch cars - leaving the trail to go cold. Suspects are identified, and investigators hope that forensic evidence from the cars could provide the vital information needed to help solve the case and bring down the thieves.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: Chicago, 1920s: During the Prohibition era, federal agent Eliot Ness assembles a small, hand-picked team to bring down notorious gangster Al Capone. Award-winning film starring Sean Connery.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Highlights of the snooker action on day 9 of the World Championship in Sheffield.

programme.title: Mint
programme.desc: Dylan announces a shocking decision about the business. It leaves Cat and Ollie stunned and sends the family’s future into doubt. But Shannon is only thinking of Arran. Can they have something special despite the world around them? Arran, meanwhile, is rebuilding a relationship with his ambitious brother Liangelo. It becomes apparent that Arran’s split loyalties might pose a problem for Shannon.

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents an hour of debate from Aberdeen as part of a series of special Question Time programmes before the elections on 7 May. On the panel: for the SNP, the housing secretary Màiri McAllan; the leader of Scottish Labour, Anas Sarwar; Reform UK’s leader in Scotland, Malcolm Offord; the leader of the Scottish Conservatives, Russell Findlay; the leader of the Scottish Liberal Democrats, Alex Cole-Hamilton; and the co-leader of the Scottish Greens, Gillian Mackay. Watch or listen to a live stream on iPlayer, the BBC News channel, Sounds, TikTok and YouTube at 7pm.

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth II: Her Story, Our Century
programme.desc: Marking what would have been Queen Elizabeth II’s 100th year, this landmark documentary tells the story of her life alongside a century of momentous change in Britain. Through archive and eyewitness reflections, the film explores how she led the monarchy through profound social, political and cultural change. Contributions from some of Britain’s best-known faces and international figures, including Dame Helen Mirren, Sir David Attenborough, Barack Obama and Queen Camilla, reveal how she remained a constant in a changing world.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: There is a lot of productive gardening going on at Beechgrove as George Anderson and Ruth Vichos both work on projects that will bear fruit later in the year. Ruth is focusing on growing for those with a small space, returning to the vertical garden that she started last year. Vertical gardening uses structures that allow plants to be stacked upwards - ideal for anyone with just a small plot or patio. She also shows how this method can still be very productive. George is in his beloved fruit cage, where after a clear-out last year, he plants a bed of new raspberry varieties and propagates new growth from Beechgrove’s existing fig tree. There is a Back to Basics guide from Colin Crosbie’s plot just outside Dumfries, and a review of Beechgrove’s gravel and grass garden, which will be thinned and replanted over the course of this season.

programme.title: Shift the Thrift
programme.desc: In Hebden Bridge, friends Emma and Sophie battle to raise money for Dove House, gambling on vintage fashion, retro collectibles and a bold sleeping-bag upcycle.

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the hidden struggles of swallows, field mice, newts and moles as they race to breed in a beautiful country garden in Cumbria.

programme.title: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad presents highlights from Wembley of Sunday’s FA Cup semi-final between Chelsea and Leeds United. Leeds reached this stage of the competition for the first time in 39 years after beating West Ham on penalties, while Chelsea thrashed League One side Port Vale 7-0 in their quarter-final. The programme also features highlights of Saturday’s semi-final between Manchester City and Southampton.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Politics Live
programme.desc: The big political issues of the day.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 10 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Today's Flog It! brings a collection of interesting and previously unseen finds from the show's travels round the country, visiting St Albans, Wolverhampton Art Gallery, the Platform in Morecambe and Grimsby Minster. Today's antiques experts include Adam Partridge, James Lewis, Christina Trevanion and Jonathon Pratt. Paul Martin also visits Coughton Court in Warwickshire.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Kelle Bryan, Antony Costa, Alexei Sayle and Emma Sidi take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman. A daily winner is declared following a quickfire round at the end of each show, and the scores are tallied across the week, resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday. Will the winning stars opt for the much-coveted House of Games wheelie luggage, or will they be tempted with the very popular bee hotel?

programme.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On board a sleek Shinkansen bullet train, Michael arrives in Tokyo, one of the greatest cities on earth, with a population of 37 million in the metropolitan area. He begins by exploring the ornate Akasaka Palace, built in 1909 by Emperor Meiji for his son, the crown prince Yoshihito. He’s surprised to find that, with its neo-baroque architecture and impressive fountains, it looks more than a little British. In the fashionable district of Ginza, Michael journeys underground to ride the Tokyo metro. He’s intrigued by the catchy jingles played at each station and meets one of the composers behind 300 of the tunes. Stopping off in the neighbourhood of Ueno to explore the famous Ameyoko street market, Michael travels to the east of the city to marvel at the Tokyo Skytree, standing at over 630 meters high. After a giddy ride to the top to take in the views, he learns how it was designed to be earthquake-proof.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day 10 of the World Snooker Championship at the Crucible Theatre, Sheffield.

programme.title: Disclosure
programme.desc: More than a decade on from her death, reporter Myles Bonnar runs the case by a veteran detective and investigates Eric Adusah's past, uncovering hidden truths. With so many questions about what happened to Charmain, he tracks the Prophet down in search of answers.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the news stories of the day. With Victoria Derbyshire.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: An American Tragedy
programme.desc: Following Jackson from the shockwaves of the Martin Bashir documentary Living with Michael Jackson to the final act of his life - and the battle over what he leaves behind. In the aftermath of the documentary, insiders describe a man in free-fall: frightened, financially exposed and increasingly isolated. Manager Dieter Wiesner recalls Michael rallying his fanbase, while rumours of mounting debts and allegations escalate. When 12-year-old Gavin Arvizo goes to police, prosecutor Ron Zonen asserts Jackson knew it was 'an inappropriate relationship'. The singer is arrested and charged, and becomes the centre of a trial that consumes a small town and the global media.

programme.title: Snooker: World Championship
programme.desc: Highlights from day 10 of the World Snooker Championship in Sheffield.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Two close friends, Yash and Raja, share a passion for cars and beautiful women. They both falls in love with the same women.

programme.title: Naya Daur
programme.desc: A man introduces a bus service in an attempt to make quick profits and endangers the peace and livelihood of local farmers and workers.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Long-suffering heiress Seeta is treated worse than a servant by her abusive money-grubbing aunt. Meanwhile, her long-lost twin sister Geeta grows up to be a gutsy street-performer. One day, the girls unintentionally swap places.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Long-suffering heiress Seeta is treated worse than a servant by her abusive money-grubbing aunt. Meanwhile, her long-lost twin sister Geeta grows up to be a gutsy street-performer. One day, the girls unintentionally swap places.

programme.title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
programme.desc: Raju, is comming to Bomaby and start working as a engineer in a company where is boss and the boss's daughtert, Sapna Chhabria who starts to make plans about Raju's bright future, which comes at a heavy price, as he does makes compromises.

programme.title: Hindustan Ki Kasam
programme.desc: When two twin brothers get separated at birth, one grows up as a Hindu in India while the other as a Muslim in Pakistan. Later, they meet at opposite sides on the battlefield.

programme.title: Train to Pakistan
programme.desc: The people of Mano Majra, a village on the Indo-Pak border, live in harmony. However, things change when a train arrives from Pakistan containing the dead bodies of the people coming to India.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: An abandoned child raised by a wealthy household takes over the family business. However, he is resented by their natural son who, fueled by a bitter uncle, tries his best to make him lose face.

programme.title: Patthar Ke Phool
programme.desc: A young police officer and the daughter of a gangster fall in love at first sight.

programme.title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
programme.desc: Raju, is comming to Bomaby and start working as a engineer in a company where is boss and the boss's daughtert, Sapna Chhabria who starts to make plans about Raju's bright future, which comes at a heavy price, as he does makes compromises.

programme.title: Yakeen 1969
programme.desc: Rajesh, a scientist, works with the Indian Government on a confidential research project. He is forced to deal with miscreants who wish to steal his research.

programme.title: Kaash
programme.desc: A film actor takes to alcohol after suffering huge losses, which in turn, takes a toll on his marriage and his wife leaves him. But when their child falls terminally ill, they reconcile for his sake.

programme.title: Waqt 1965
programme.desc: A businessman's family is torn apart by an earthquake and reunited years later in a courtroom trial where father and sons stand opposed in the roles of accused, lawyer and testifying witness.

programme.title: Zara Si Zindagi
programme.desc: An MA in philosophy, Raja arrives in Delhi to look for employment and comes across Kusum, a struggling stage actress. They both face hardships in order to make a living.

programme.title: Agni Pareeksha
programme.desc: A mentally unstable Alok runs away on the eve of his wedding and falls in love with his friend Siddharth's fiancee. Thereafter, Alok gets murdered and Siddharth becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Choron Ki Baarat
programme.desc: Anju, a beautiful and spoilt woman, falls in love with a mysterious man, Shekhar. However, with time she realises that he has other motives.

programme.title: Khote Sikkay
programme.desc: An unknown horseback rider is after Jhanga, an evil and troublesome gangster who has terrorised everybody in the village, because he is responsible for his father's death.

programme.title: Dhund
programme.desc: After crashing his car on a foggy night, a man seeks help at a nearby home, where he encounters a dead man and a woman holding a gun. After hearing her sad story, he helps her hide the crime.

programme.title: Karm
programme.desc: Asha and Arvind are in love but are not allowed to marry by her astrologer father. They start living together and plan to start a family without getting married, but fate intervenes.

programme.title: Gumrah 1963
programme.desc: Meena is in love with a singer, Rajendra and wishes to marry him. However, when her sister, Kamla, dies in an accident, she is forced to marry her brother-in-law for the sake of her sister's children.

programme.title: Ghar Jamai
programme.desc: Dwarka, a millionaire, is impressed by Anil, a principled man, and wants him to marry Mona, his daughter. However, after their marriage, he compels him to move into his house.

programme.title: Zameer 1975
programme.desc: A king's son is kidnapped by a dacoit. Years later, a boy claiming to be the son arrives at the palace, but he falls in love with the king's daughter.

programme.title: Raaz
programme.desc: Kumar, who lives in Africa, keeps getting dreams of a railway station called Viran Nagar. When he arrives in India, the villagers believe him to be a ghost and share an unsettling tale.

programme.title: Zamana
programme.desc: Ravi and Vinod's father is killed by a gangster for developing a photo that depicts a crime scene. Ravi, a criminal, and Vinod, a police officer, decide to exact revenge on their father's murderer.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: A notorious boy decides to attend college in Bangalore, but instead falls in love with a girl who has to marry a terrorizing police officer.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: An abandoned child raised by a wealthy household takes over the family business. However, he is resented by their natural son who, fueled by a bitter uncle, tries his best to make him lose face.

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum 3
programme.desc: Kanhaiya and his friend Rocky make a living by acting in adult movies. Things take a turn when Kanhaiya falls in love with Shalu, and finds it hard to convince her conservative father.Cast: Tushaar Kapoor, Aftab Shivdasani, Director:Umesh Ghadge 2016

programme.title: Undertrial
programme.desc: Sagar Hussain, a factory worker, is falsely accused of and imprisoned for raping his own daughters. Later, when his lawyer digs deeper, the truth reveals itself to be much worse than imagined.

programme.title: Dear Maya
programme.desc: Two girls decide to prank a local woman by writing letters for her as her secret admirer. However, things take a turn when she goes missing.

programme.title: Baabul
programme.desc: Will Malvika the widower be able to remove her husband Avinash from her heart and mind and marry someone else?

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mumbai
programme.desc: A tale of two gangsters from the eras of past and present, whose lives enter parallel paths as they struggle to survive within Bombay's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Lsd Love Sex Aur Dhokha
programme.desc: A video camcorder, a store security camera, and concealed cameras candidly expose lives in three loosely-linked tales.

programme.title: Lsd Love Sex Aur Dhokha
programme.desc: A video camcorder, a store security camera, and concealed cameras candidly expose lives in three loosely-linked tales.

programme.title: The Stoneman Murders
programme.desc: Mumbai of 1980s is terrorised by a serial killer who ruthlessly kills pavement dwellers in their sleep. A suspended police officer then decides to step in and conduct an investigation.

programme.title: Dil Hai Betaab
programme.desc: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry.

programme.title: Agnee Prem
programme.desc: When two childhood friends are separated from each other, they promise to meet each year at a temple on a hill. However, they meet 10 years later when they are grown-ups.

programme.title: Mohabbat 1997
programme.desc: Gaurav and Rohit, two best friends, fall in love with Shweta. After a traumatic accident, Rohit dies and Shweta gets engaged to Gaurav, who seems to be hiding a deadly secret.

programme.title: Mehndi
programme.desc: The mother and sister in law abused their son's wife.

programme.title: Pyaar Zindagi Hai
programme.desc: Pratap's growing obsession with Priya, his sister-in-law, drives him to kill his wife. However, when he realises that Priya is betrothed to Amit, Pratap goes to great lengths to attain her.

programme.title: Sultaan
programme.desc: Don Kabira helps Ayesha in saving her garage from local goons and hides the fact that he once used to be an honest inspector. However, Ayesha decides to find out the reason for his transformation.

programme.title: Parwana
programme.desc: Parwana, a thief, steals a bag containing explosives, which belongs to a dangerous man. The police then set out to hunt him as he is now labelled a terrorist.

programme.title: Pratigyabadh
programme.desc: Shankar grows up to become the right hand man of a gangster. His goal in life is to take revenge on the moneylender who left his family homeless and a truck driver who molested and killed his mother.

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum
programme.desc: Rahul is told by a street astrologer that he will find his soul-mate in a girl who has a birthmark on her right breast. Urmila Martodkar walks into his life, birthmark and all. But what they don’t know is that she is not a girl, but is a gay boy.

programme.title: Zakhm
programme.desc: A boy, born into a family of varying religions, finds himself embroiled in communal riots. Soon, his mother's death becomes an issue raised to fulfil political agendas.

programme.title: Hum
programme.desc: A wealthy and cruel businessman, Bhaktawar lord over a dockyard making all the workers his slaves. All the workers will work but no one will entail a salary, the union leader Tiger opposes this and protests and is eventually silenced by Bhaktawar.

programme.title: Guddu
programme.desc: Guddu and Salina meet with an accident and she loses her eyesight. Later, when Guddu learns that he is terminally ill, he decides to donate his eyes to her, but his father disapproves.

programme.title: Kohram
programme.desc: Major Balbir (Amitabh Bachchan) attempts to kill the Indian Home Minister Veer Bhadra Singh (Danny Denzongpa) but is unsuccessful. He has been identified, and the army is on the look-out for him to court-martial him.

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum
programme.desc: Rahul is told by a street astrologer that he will find his soul-mate in a girl who has a birthmark on her right breast. Urmila Martodkar walks into his life, birthmark and all. But what they don’t know is that she is not a girl, but is a gay boy.

programme.title: Karobaar: The Business of Love
programme.desc: Friends Rajiv and Amar go their separate ways after Seema decides to be with Amar rather than Rajiv. Years later, prosecution lawyer Amar is delighted to see Rajiv in court and accused of murder.

programme.title: Teri Payal Mere Geet
programme.desc: Premi makes a living by selling poems to Benni and falls in love with a courtesan, Laila Jaan. However, he leaves her after finding the truth about her but tries to get back with her.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Tune every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The Farmer tasks Bitzer with baling up a fresh haystack, but the hungry sheep have hidden inside and are turned into moving bales. A wild game of chase the bale results as Bitzer tries to restore order to the hay field.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Animated series. Only Danger Mouse can save the world from chaos when the Baron stops the world spinning with a plague of traffic lights.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Power-hungry tiny alien Empress Miasma takes control of Gnasher from the inside and uses him in her attempts to take over planet Earth. But when Miasma breaks out of Gnasher into Beanotown for real and Walter helps her grow in size, mayhem really takes hold!

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Mouse buys a video game that is supposed to teach the family teamwork. When they end up bickering as they play, Mouse creates a robot that turns off the game if they argue. However, a robot malfunction places the whole family in danger. To survive they will have to finish the video game without arguing - unless they can think of a way to make bickering help.

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Topical news magazine for children.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton lies to his grandma.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight for the last jar of Yummy with magic Mayan bracelets.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: When his beloved plant is sold by mistake, Duck must lose his job at the garden centre in order to retrieve it from a top-security greenhouse.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Frog creates chaos in a loo roll factory, leaving Duck covered in toilet paper. Duck just wants to fix the machine, but Frog is convinced he’s a spooky mummy!

programme.title: Counterfeit Cat
programme.desc: Max and Gark become famous singers after getting stuck together with bin juice.

programme.title: Bro's in Control
programme.desc: Callum is a Little Bro in control! He’s pitting his Big Bro Adam against best mate Joe to see who will win a series of funny, gungy and gross challenges and who will land an awful forfeit from the Wheel of Doom in this epic competition. Callum's the Little Bro, but he’s in control, so Adam and Joe had better impress him! When Joe and Adam press play on a mysterious voice note, they know it’ll be a long but extra 24 hours. Little Bro Callum is challenging them to let him control their day. With tasks like bathing in cold mud, snacking on edible insects and wearing their pants on their head, nothing's normal in this high-key contest to be the best. After Callum’s decided on a winner, it’s onto the next funny challenge: will they choose to save their crab friend or their stuff? And why is a giant shark distracting them?!

programme.desc: In this episode, Steve explores animals that are often overlooked - our minibeasts! Steve identifies a venomous vole no bigger than your little finger, as well as revealing that mysterious holes in a patio are actually built by unusual bees and that driver ants are truly deadly. He even introduces us to a spider with what looks like a golf ball stuck on its behind! In a DIY demo, Steve then shows us how to transform our green spaces into wildlife havens. programme.title: Anjani Puthra
programme.desc: Viraj defends his ancestral land from a powerful gangster, sparking a violent and emotional conflict that puts his family, pride, and life on the line.

programme.title: Gajaana
programme.desc: A group of adventurers enters a forest in search of hidden treasure but soon finds themselves being stalked by a sinister and mysterious force that turns their quest into a fight for survival.

programme.title: DNA
programme.desc: Anand and Divya-each scarred by past trauma-marry and welcome a baby. But Divya insists the child isn't theirs. As Anand reluctantly joins the investigation.

programme.title: Meri Taqat Mera Faisla Power And Judgement
programme.desc: Meri Taqat Mera Faisla Power And Judgement

programme.title: Khatarnak Policewala
programme.desc: A policeofficer to fight corruption goes undercover as a thief in the underworld

programme.title: They Call Him Og
programme.desc: A former Mumbai crime lord, Ojas Gambheera, returns after ten years in hiding to wage revenge on rival gangs, reigniting blood feuds and shaking the criminal landscape.

programme.title: Devaki Nandan Vasudeva
programme.desc: Tormented by prophetic fears, Kamsaraja harms his sister's kin. In prison, Krishna protects the family from Kamsaraja's dark plots, ensuring their safety.

programme.title: Bharaate
programme.desc: Jagan and Radha reunite after fate brings them back together despite an abrupt departure.

programme.title: Fraud Saiyaan
programme.desc: Bhola, a charming con artist, tricks women into marriage to fulfill his greed, but his deceitful actions eventually lead him into serious trouble.

programme.title: Jigarbaaz Khiladi
programme.desc: A ruthless gangster rises in the criminal underworld, driven by ambition and revenge, but his violent choices lead to betrayal, downfall, and the harsh cost of power.

programme.title: Neevevaro
programme.desc: A blind chef's world is turned upside down when the woman he's fallen in love with goes missing, and he enlists the help of his friend to locate her.

programme.title: Krishna Ka Badla
programme.desc: Babu, unsatisfied with his acting career, plans to move to the US. However, his grandfather's request to stage a play changes his life forever.

programme.title: Gaalodu
programme.desc: Raju, a poor wanderer, wins the heart of wealthy Shukla-love knows no bounds!

programme.title: F2: Fun And Frustration
programme.desc: A comedy of errors follows two frustrated husbands whose lives spiral into chaos as they try to escape marital woes, leading to hilarious moments and unexpected realizations.

programme.title: Acp Shiva
programme.desc: A officer separates from his father in his childhood but later realises that his father is a good man.

programme.title: Zombie Reddy
programme.desc: Mario, a game developer, and his friends, get caught up in the rivalry between two families and a mysterious zombie attack in Rayalaseema where they go to attend a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Veera Simha Reddy
programme.desc: Jai sets out to reunite with his estranged father, Veera, after learning about his parents' difficult past. However, trouble arises when Veera's complicated reality catches up with Jai.

programme.title: The Warriorr
programme.desc: Upon challenging Guru, a dominant gangster, Sathya is forced to move out of his city. However, when he returns as a DSP, Sathya pledges to seek revenge.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Sachidanandan, a prison inmate, aids the police with his night vision but seeks peace after serving time.

programme.title: Junga
programme.desc: After learning about his father and grandfather's past, a simple bus conductor turns to the world of crime in a bid to retrieve his ancestral property.

programme.title: Marzi The Power
programme.desc: Gani and Krishnaveni's romance is disrupted when her past love resurfaces to reclaim her.

programme.title: A1 Express
programme.desc: A newcomer in town falls for a hockey player but battles a corrupt politician threatening the team's practice ground.

programme.title: Uvaa
programme.desc: Five teenagers face romance and turmoil at a new school, but a shocking event alters their lives.

programme.title: Roberrt
programme.desc: Raghava, a chef, enjoys tranquillity with his son until his past resurfaces, disrupting their peaceful life.

programme.title: Conjuring Kannappan
programme.desc: After clumsily plucking feathers off a spooky dreamcatcher, a family finds itself in a nightmarish realm where injuries and death manifest in reality.

programme.title: Maargan
programme.desc: A Mumbai cop, Dhruv, hunts a serial killer using a dangerous drug. As clues unfold, investigators realize the suspect may be far deadlier than anticipated.

programme.title: Sangharsh Aur Vijay
programme.desc: Badri, protector of the temple at Badrinath, meets an agnostic, Alakananda and gradually helps her believe in God's existence.

programme.title: Power Unlimited 2
programme.desc: Karthikeya, a peaceful businessman, must act when his sister witnesses a murder. His quest for justice leads him to confront a dark past that threatens to derail him.

programme.title: Et - Etharkkum Thunindhavan
programme.desc: A lawyer becomes judge, jury, and executioner to chase a gang led by a minister's son, who threatens women with damaging videos. Justice collides with vigilantism.

programme.title: Gangs Of Wasseypur 2
programme.desc: Faizal Khan plots revenge on Ramadhir Singh, eventually building an empire, and forcing Singh to seek peace.

Dani has admitted to some of the group that Dan has been flirting with Ella, and Courtney is not happy. Meanwhile, Diags organises a coach day out with the whole group to a local fishing village. Things start well, but shortly after the group depart things take a turn as gossip and sneaky chats between friends get overheard. It ends in tears for Freddie and Liv with an awkward silence amongst the rest of the group as they approach the port. Will they play happy families for the rest of the trip, or will the chaos continue? Later, at the fishing village, Dani brings Ella and Freddie together. Can they finally move on and be best friends again, or is there just too much history?

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Stewie gets a new teapot from Bruce at the flea market while Peter is barred by Lois from buying Dr Hartman's old Mr Potato Head due to its 600-dollar price tag, an upset Peter is swayed by a commercial from Tom Selleck to sign up for a reverse mortgage that causes the Griffins to lose their house and Peter and Mayor West to go confront the man that Peter holds responsible for it.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Following a relaxing family vacation in Nantucket, Lois discovers that she has been banned from the Airbnb app due to a poor review citing a stolen object - when everyone else says that they stole nothing, Lois eventually finds out that she mistakenly stole a fancy shampoo bottle. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian discover saltwater taffy on the trip and decide to buy it in bulk and sell it door-to-door back in Quahog.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. Peter signs up to take the place of the retiring Pawtucket Brewery's nightwatchman - when a drunk Principal Shepherd bribes him with cash to let him and his fellow principals steal some beer, Peter decides to turn the brewery into an after-hours bar. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian find a lost dog poster with a big cash reward and exploit Brian's similarity to the missing pooch to try to claim the reward.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: US animated comedy series about the escapades of Stan Smith, an extreme right-wing CIA agent dealing with family life and keeping America safe in the most absurd way possible. Stan becomes addicted to dying after Roger tricks him into thinking that he had a heart attack, and Klaus takes Steve to Arizona State University for a college visit where a fraternity hazes him.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated comedy series. Francine steals from the CIA and pretends to be a sexy supervillain in a bid to push Stan into being more seductive, and Roger plans to trap Jay Leno and have his revenge on him.

programme.title: Wycliffe: The Cycle of Death
programme.desc: The pilot episode of the popular West Country detective drama series based on the books by WJ Burley. When a bookshop owner in Penzance is brutally murdered, Wycliffe discovers that all is not well among the members of one of the area's most respected families.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway enter the archaic world of St Gerard's Hall when a visiting female bishop is found dead after drinking poisoned wine - was she was murdered because her liberal views contradicted those of the reactionary religious leaders of the college? When another two deaths occur and both mirror macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, Lewis and Hathaway realise that the motive is much more convoluted...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness that Lewis himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Gwenda Halliday has never been to England before - when she moves into the house of her dreams, she begins to have ghostly apparitions. On discovering that Gwenda grew up in the house as a child, the mystery takes a more sinister edge as she and Miss Marple realise that an unsolved murder was committed in the house.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a British agent comes back to haunt him after a grisly murder in Midsomer Parva. A pleasant afternoon at a cricket match turns ugly when former county-cricketer - and ex-spy - Geoffrey Larkin is found gashed to death. Locals blame the 'beast of Midsomer', but Barnaby is unconvinced, especially when he discovers that umpire and retired spymaster Malcolm Frazer is using his home, Allenby House, as a safe house. Soon Barnaby discovers links to a spy ring that operated in Berlin during the Cold War, but his investigation is obstructed at every turn, and it seems as though shady dealings are still going on at Allenby House. Then there is another murder - can Barnaby solve the crime before any people get hurt? And will his police career survive a run-in with MI6? Guest starring Peter Davison, Alice Krige and Anna Massey.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When octogenarian Felicity Law puts a recently discovered piece by local landscape artist Henry Hogson up for auction, the painting causes a fierce bidding war. But soon after the sale, Felicity is found tortured and killed. She had announced that she would give the proceeds of the sale to the Arnold Simms School of Art, a school that helps criminals and which had recently lost its funding. Barnaby enlists Simms' art teacher daughter Matilda to help him navigate the local art world. He soon finds many tangled relationships between teachers, dealers and buyers. Things get more complicated when a Hogson masterpiece is stolen and Matilda's former lover Graham Spate offers another Hogson to greedy art dealer Anthony Prideaux. Then the death count begins to rise. The key to the case seems to be Matilda's 'little black book' - but can Barnaby and Jones find the book and catch the killer before anyone else gets hurt?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University clashes with big business when science fellow George Jeffers threatens to go public with what he believes is a potentially lethal software glitch in a new air traffic control system. American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out and puts pressure on the University authorities. But when village schoolteacher Emily Harte is killed by a hit-and-run driver, Barnaby wonders if Jeffers was the real target.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The body of a local troublemaker and lothario is found dead in the model village which is the chief tourist attraction of Little Worthy.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace navigates the aftermath of Sandy’s suicide, his newfound son Bruno, and a profound personal loss in his and Cleo’s life, his team is called to a Sussex beach when an unidentified male body washes up dead in a barrel. The very same morning, Brighton football stadium receives a chilling anonymous demand and is faced with an impossible decision. Roy, who is at the match bonding with Bruno, now finds himself locked in a frantic race to save hundreds of lives, which comes at great personal risk. But the day’s terrifying events are only just beginning when an eerie CCTV discovery comes to light, leading Grace to believe that the family of a wealthy club shareholder is being targeted. The question is why. When forensics on the body from the beach indicate that the victim may in fact be linked to events at the stadium, in order to save an innocent life from imminent death, Grace must enter a cruel world of corruption, where normal rules don’t apply, and human lives have no value.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The second part of a two-part story which closes the book on this long-running series. The past is catching up with Frost in more ways than one as a series of copycat crimes convinces Superintendent Mullett that his veteran DI's life is in danger - there are now two killers to bring to justice, but that will not happen until tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the murder of a professor of German history who had a fascination with local underground boxing bouts - when they learn that one of his students was the latest winner of one fight, they suspect that the murder may have connections to the underworld.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway are sent upon a seemingly impossible quest when botanist Liv Nash accidentally digs up the body of the recently-buried professor Murray Hawes - Murray was a man possessed and fixated upon solving an impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll, but could his obsession have been dangerous enough to get him killed?

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The departure of Dr Dibbs sees Martin move back into his old surgery and agree to stay for a couple of months until a replacement can be appointed - determined to get to grips with fatherhood, he asks Louisa to move into his house so he can help to raise their child and even suggests that Louisa and the baby could move to London with him. Louisa reluctantly agrees to move into the Doc's house and offers to help with reception duties as Pauline has left, but she is none too sure about the move to London as she had hoped to resume her career as headmistress of the village school - meanwhile, Portwenn packs out the village church for the funeral of the Doc's Aunt Joan. As the villagers are shocked when Martin's eulogy becomes a health warning about the dangers to the heart of eating the wrong food, Joan's sister Ruth attends the funeral and demonstrates the same cantankerous character as her nephew after learning that she is to inherit Joan's house and farm.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Sleepless nights take their toll on Martin and Louisa as they try to find ways to comfort their constantly wailing baby, and Aunt Ruth deals with an intruder on the farm who has stolen the hubcaps from her car - when the thief is identified as Michael Dunwich, who lives with his mother Shirley, Ruth decides to pay a visit to the mother and her son. It soon becomes clear to psychiatrist Ruth that Michael is a bit odd as he has a collection of metal objects strewn around the garden - meanwhile, Shirley makes an appointment with Martin to discuss crippling stomach pains that she has been suffering from. When her son is out of the room, Shirley tells the Doc that she thinks that her son is trying to poison her so he can have the house to himself - elsewhere, new receptionist Morwenna Newcross fails to make a good impression by arriving late on her first day, appearing to be hyperactive, and getting sacked when Martin alleges that she is high on drugs.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. When Rosemary and Laura answer a call from Professor James Mullins as he is having problems with an unknown blight on his beloved allotment, the girls find themselves caught up in his fight to stop the land being sold to developers - although he is blind, James is still as sharp as ever and lives a fiercely independent lifestyle with the help of his guide dog Tiberius. After a particularly bitter allotment committee meeting, Rosemary and Laura arrive to take some soil samples but instead find James lying dead in a deep pit - Jangles, a vagrant who lives in a nearby caravan, saw no-one and the police assume that the blind man simply fell. Not believing that it was an accident, Rosemary and Laura stake out the place at night to find the culprit... but instead discover drugs, another death, and dangerous dealings in high finance.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Rosemary and Laura are asked to bring Baffington Churchyard back to its former glory in time for a medieval fair - at its heart is an ancient yew tree which makes Laura feel edgy because it's known as the tree of death. Nearby Brockett's Farm, owned by Marie Sutton, is in high demand - local landowner Franklin Danvers wants to turn it into a medieval agricultural museum, but bidding against him is Redland Linton from herbal remedy company Knussens, who hope to use bark from the farm's extensive yew plantation to produce a natural cure for cancer. When Marie's brother Malcolm bursts into a public meeting after an absence of several years and announces his plans to sell the farm to housing developers, Rosemary and Laura arrive to start work the next morning and find Malcolm killed by an arrow. With a village full of suspects, the pair realise that the killing is as much about unrequited love as land.

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Detective drama series following two detectives who seemingly have nothing in common but are thrown together and forge a rumbustious partnership in Bath. In a case of social media versus reality, a lifestyle influencer dies during a routine nose job, leaving McDonald and Dodds to separate the fact from fiction.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Lymstock is a town with more than its share of shameful secrets, a town where even a sudden outbreak of anonymous hate mail causes only a minor stir - however, Miss Marple believes that there is more to the case than meets the eye when Mona Symmington takes her own life as a result of one of the letters. The town is thrown into turmoil as the letters become ever more deadly - someone local must be responsible, so can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A housebreaker known as 'the Creeper' is terrorising the villages, and the latest victim is Chief Constable Richard Lovell. Meanwhile, Jack Filby holds a dinner party at upper-crust Chettham Park House - but the evening proves fatal for one guest. When Barnaby and Jones investigate, they find a group of friends whose ties to a local gangster and the Chief Constable go back to the 1960s. While the detectives try to dig up more information, the burglaries and murders continue - and it looks as though the Creeper knows plenty of secrets that others would rather stayed hidden.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates the case of a four-member syndicate who own a racehorse. Two members are desperate to sell the horse and two are determined to keep it, then one of them is murdered.

programme.title: Playing Nice

programme.title: Playing Nice
programme.desc: Psychological thriller series, adapted from the best-selling novel by JP Delaney, that is set against a sweeping Cornish landscape. Pete and Maddie begin the fight to keep Theo - not only is it expensive and painful, but the constant dredging up of their past also starts to damage their relationship.

programme.desc: Nick struggles to combine fatherhood with full-time police work until his mum comes to the rescue. Meanwhile, Greengrass sets up a darts match with high stakes.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Rivalry between traditional film photographers and digital camera fans in the village of Luxton Deeping reaches fever pitch at an annual photographic society exhibition when snapper Steve Bright threatens black and white film enthusiast Lionel Bell - Lionel is then photographing his favourite oak trees when he is strangled with the cord from his light meter. Lionel's diary shows that Barnaby visited him the night he died and a glass with his fingerprints is found... but is he being framed?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Pollard's factory launch descends into chaos. Donald sets his sights on getting Anna and Carl together, while Debbie orchestrates a plan to return the van to the Kings.

He grills David about his future and soon realises that although David’s a bit cocky, he obviously cares about Tina. Becky spends the evening in the pub.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Harry puts pressure on Dan to admit Steve didn’t intentionally leave him for dead but Dan’s unrepentant and he’s enjoying making Steve suffer. Ken goes to buy a chicken but he gets side-tracked and ends up in the Rovers.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Police drama series set in the Yorkshire Dales. Strangers in the village become the focus of local hostility amidst reports of a peeping tom, and Nick's mum makes a determined attempt to court Sergeant Blaketon.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic drama series. A young German's arrival stirs up buried resentment, and an eccentric old couple have a wedding anniversary to remember.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of Badger's Drift is disturbed when schoolteacher Connie Bishop screams in fright that she has an intruder. Later, at a meeting of the Frobisher Night committee, Connie clashes with trophy wife Zukie Richardson who wants to make the fundraising event grander with cash from her wealthy husband. When the body of a councillor who also opposed Zukie's plans is found in Connie's garden, the police are called, and DCI Tom Barnaby has another case of murder to deal with. Slimy womaniser Laurence Mann offers to change Connie's locks, but she wakes in the night to find him in the summerhouse with his throat cut. Not wishing to be alone in the cottage, Connie asks shy sculptor Justin Hooper to stay in her spare room - but he awakes to find her sleepwalking and trying to kiss him. When the police arrive, Connie confesses that she may have committed the murders in her sleep, saying she heard voices saying 'kill him'. But is she telling the truth?

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A mysterious phone message leads DCI Banks to Harrogate to search for his estranged younger brother Roy - meanwhile, Banks's team are introduced to DI Helen Morton, who has been drafted to cover Annie's maternity leave, at the scene of the murder of a young woman found in her car. When Banks's name and address are found in the pocket of the victim, Helen speculates that their boss could be a suspect in the case - unaware that his team are searching for him, Banks begins to delve into the life of his brother and soon uncovers questionable business transactions and associates as well as an angry fiancee and an affair. Could Banks's brother be the killer that his team are searching for?

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. While Banks has been searching for his missing younger brother Roy, DI Helen Morton has become convinced that Roy is the prime suspect in the Jennifer Lewis murder - when a body found at Halton quarry turns out to be Roy, Morton has one more murder to solve while Banks must return to his childhood home to inform his parents of the terrible news. When Banks' parents - who are desperate for answers - plead with him to find out what happened to Roy, Banks defies Morton and returns to the station to try and lead the investigation into the murders of Roy and Jennifer. Both are convinced that the answer to the case lies with Carmen, an 'exotic companion' being treated at the Berger-Lennox clinic, and so Banks and Morton agree to put their differences aside to help each other get to the truth.

programme.title: The Car Years

Choosing which classic car wins is an expert judging panel - making the decision are former Top Gear Stig and Hollywood stunt driver Ben Collins, journalist and presenter Jason Barlow, and classic car specialist and auctioneer Nick Wells.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Meet a team pumping out paint and luxury wallpaper for the most discerning of DIYers, then learn how a homemade guitar amp changed the course of music history overnight.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Sky Bet Sunday Series
programme.desc: Musselburgh: Oli Bell presents live coverage of the second round of the 2026 Sunday Series from Musselburgh. Richard Hoiles provides the commentary. [S]

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: The 14th entry in the James Bond film series and the last to star Roger Moore as the secret agent. When James Bond is sent to investigate a security leak at high-tech company Zorin Industries, he discovers a hotbed of murder and deception - Max Zorin, the company's mysterious owner has devised a plan to corner the world's microchip market... even if he has to kill millions to do it. Before Bond can stop Zorin, he must confront the madman's beautiful and deadly companion May Day - with help from geologist Stacey Sutton, Bond launches an all-out assault on Zorin's deadly scheme that concludes with a treacherous duel on the upper spans of the Golden Gate Bridge.

Four armed men hijack a subway train in Manhattan one early afternoon in New York City - their leader is called Ryder, and he connects by phone with Walter Garber, a dispatcher who is watching the train's line and who has been temporarily demoted from a supervisor position while being investigated for bribery. Ryder then demands ten million dollars within one hour... or else will start shooting hostages.

programme.title: Toxic Shark

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across The Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Miles travels the multiverse with Gwen, teaming up with Spider-People to fight the villain Spot while facing multiverse dangers and complex rules in this epic adventure.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: An enormous radioactively mutated lizard runs rampant on the island of Manhattan.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: A spooky adventure where kids face mysterious creatures unleashed from a magical book, leading to thrilling encounters and a race to save their town.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A troubled teen learns discipline and courage through martial arts training, finding purpose and respect under an unconventional mentor.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six people are captured in a perilous game of escape rooms. To survive, they must team up with two original survivors, but as the rounds go, they wonder if this is a game they've been through before.

programme.title: Welcome To The Jungle
programme.desc: A bounty hunter heads to the Amazon to square a debt and teams up with a bad guy in the search for treasure.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom face alien threats and a relentless soldier, forcing them to make a life-altering choice.

programme.title: Brightburn
programme.desc: What if a child from another world crash landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister?

programme.title: The Retirement Plan
programme.desc: Ashley's ties with the wrong people endanger her family, prompting her to seek help from her estranged father, who lives a quiet retired life in the Cayman Islands.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: Armored truck security guards are trapped in a deadly robbery plot, forcing them to choose between greed and survival amid rising danger.

programme.title: A-X-L
programme.desc: Family adventure. The life of a teenage boy is forever altered by a chance encounter with cutting edge military technology.

programme.title: When A Stranger Calls
programme.desc: A high school student's babysitting job takes a nightmarish turn when a series of phone calls from a stranger insist that she 'check the children'.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A chauvinist puts a romantically challenged producer through a series of outrageous tests to prove his theories about relationships.

programme.title: Battle Los Angeles
programme.desc: Facing a catastrophic global invasion, a determined squadron of U.S. Marines steps forward, embodying humanity's final hope against overwhelming extraterrestrial forces.

programme.title: Kraven The Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven, driven by vengeance and shaped by his father's cruelty, becomes the world's most feared hunter. His journey blurs the line between justice and obsession as he seeks redemption.

programme.title: The Mitchells Vs The Machines
programme.desc: The Mitchells, a quirky, dysfunctional family, must put aside their differences and fight a robot apocalypse during their long-awaited road trip, all while trying to save humanity.

programme.title: Men In Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J travels in time to MIB's early days in 1969 to stop an alien from assassinating his friend Agent K and changing history.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: A shrewd young man and a masterful treasure hunter put aside their differences to find a lost ancient fortune dating back 500 years.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: An undisciplined boy must learn Drunken Fist Kung Fu in order to stop an assassin.Star: Jackie Chan

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: Alice wakes up to find that Raccoon city is infested with zombies and monsters. Later, she tries her best to find a way out of the city before it is too late.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary crew travelling through the Amazon picks up a stranded man whose hobby is to capture the giant Anaconda snake.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The original Ghostbusters reunite with a new team to battle a powerful, death-chilling god threatening the world.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Peter Parker grapples with his dual identity as a teenager and the burgeoning superhero, Spider-Man, balancing the extraordinary with the ordinary challenges of youth.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Detectives Mike and Marcus uncover a drug lord's plan to control Miami.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Denzel Washington, Marton Csokas, Chloe Grace Moretz. A former Black Ops commando fakes his own death in hopes of living out a quiet life.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: A super-soldier resurrected with advanced nanotech seeks revenge and uncovers secrets about his past in this action-packed thriller.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel goes awry, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together.

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049
programme.desc: Officer K of the LAPD discovers a dangerous secret and embarks on a mission to find a missing former blade runner who vanished over thirty years ago, risking everything to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Meatballs
programme.desc: A scientist tries to solve world hunger only to see things go awry as food falls from the sky in abundance.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: Detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett join the Miami Police Department's special team AMMO to bring down the ruthless Armando, who is on a mission to kill Mike at his mother Isabel's orders.

programme.title: The Water Horse
programme.desc: During WWII, Angus finds a mysterious egg that hatches a water horse. He protects the growing creature from soldiers and danger, forming a deep bond in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: The most glamorous private eyes are sent into action when electronics genius Eric Knox is kidnapped.

programme.title: The Unholy
programme.desc: The Unholy is a supernatural horror about a deaf girl who, after a visit from a spirit she believes to be the Virgin Mary, suddenly speaks and heals others, but dark, sinister forces are at play.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Terrorists attempt to kidnap a wealthy child. Their plan is foiled when a deadly black mamba is sent instead of a harmless snake.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: A team of scientists aboard the International Space Station finds a rapidly evolving life form that caused extinction on Mars, and now threatens the crew and all life on Earth.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Captain Artemis and her soldiers are pulled into a world where dangerous monsters and humans co-exist. They must escape with the help from a hunter.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride Or Die
programme.desc: Miami detectives, defying protocol, investigate their captain's murder, uncovering a dangerous conspiracy of corruption and cartel involvement, seeking justice and vindication.

programme.title: The Pope'S Exorcist
programme.desc: Glimpses of the events that exorcist father Gabriele Amorth's experiences while assisting a possessed child and revealing a conspiracy that has been kept secret within the Vatican for years.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Driven by a rare blood disorder, Dr. Morbius takes a desperate risk to save others, unknowingly unleashing a dark force within himself.

programme.title: Toofan
programme.desc: Archana and Manik's sons-Ranju, Raja, and Rabi-split apart due to Mona's schemes. After great costs, fate reunites the family at last.

programme.title: Chaalbaaz
programme.desc: Separated twins Anju and Manju swap lives by chance. Shy Anju adapts to rural life, while bold Manju seeks revenge against their cruel uncle for past wrongs.

programme.title: Nadiya Ke Paar
programme.desc: Chandan loves Gunja, but after her sister's tragic death, tradition demands she marry his brother. Torn between love and duty, Gunja faces a heartbreaking choice that could change everything.

programme.title: Phool Aur Angaar
programme.desc: Love with Sudha Verma entangles a middle-class professor in a gangsters' world, leading to murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Judaai
programme.desc: Kajal, craving luxury, marries Raj but accepts Janhvi's ?2 crore to let her marry him instead, leading to unexpected twists in their relationships.

programme.title: Sandwich
programme.desc: Shekar's feelings for Nisha hit a snag when his sister's wedding depends on him marrying someone else. Love and family ties clash, making for a messy romantic dilemma!

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: A carefree young man's antics lead to hilarious confusion as he juggles love, lies and unexpected twists in a rib-tickling comedy.

programme.title: Kabzaa (1988)

programme.title: Daraar
programme.desc: Suspicion and fear poison a marriage as love turns to hatred, and betrayal pushes two lives into a dangerous spiral of obsession and revenge.

programme.title: Run (2004)
programme.desc: Jhanvi and Siddharth are deeply in love, but her gangster brother Ganpat disapproves and plans to kill Siddharth, putting their relationship and lives in grave danger.

programme.title: Roti Kapda Aur Makan
programme.desc: Bharat struggles after his father's retirement to support his Delhi family; his brother's crime, girlfriend's engagement, and poverty force a choice between honesty and survival.

programme.title: Dabangg
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey fights crime his own way, but Cheddi Singh's schemes tear his family apart. Loyalty, justice, and power collide in this gripping tale of brotherhood and betrayal.

programme.title: Avtaar

programme.title: Maharaja

programme.title: Trimurti
programme.desc: Kalyani fights to save her son Nandu after his arrest, asking Jagannath for mercy and his release, hoping fairness, hope, and relief will come soon.

programme.title: Naya Khoon
programme.desc: Vikram isn't happy about Seema marrying Anand and makes his disapproval clear, leading to tension between friends as he tries to convince Seema to reconsider her choice.

programme.title: Jurm
programme.desc: Ritesh with evidence to expose the wrong doings of some people gets killed. Shekhar discovers the people behind Ritesh's murder.

programme.title: Dabangg
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey faces off against Baccha Singh, a local goon and aspiring politician. The conflict escalates when Chulbul kills Baccha Singh's younger brother, intensifying their personal vendetta.

programme.title: Sankranti Ko Anne Vaale Hai
programme.desc: Starring: Venkatesh,Aishwarya Rajesh. After a famous tech entrepreneur is kidnapped on her return to India, a police officer seeks help from her ex-boyfriend, a former cop now living a quiet family life.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun
programme.desc: Starring: Madhuri Dixit,Salman Khan. Prem madly loves Nisha, his brother Rajesh's sister-in-law. But when Rajesh's wife dies, the families urge him to marry Nisha for the sake of his baby. Prem and Nisha decide to sacrifice their love.

programme.title: Surya The Soldier

programme.desc: Starring: Vijay Antony,Suresh Gopi. Disgruntled cop seizes hospital control due to son's neglect and conflict ensues when he rejects a direct order from his senior officer.

programme.title: Pakka Commercial
programme.desc: Starring: Gopichand,Raashii Khanna. In a legal rollercoaster, Judge Suryanarayana quits after failing to serve justice. His wily son, Lucky, takes center stage, exposing a criminal's hidden sins.
